SEARCH
Package com.keyin.ticketnestbackend.rest.payment

Class PaymentService

java.lang.Object
com.keyin.ticketnestbackend.rest.payment.PaymentService
@Service public class PaymentService extends Object
Service class for managing payment-related operations. Handles payment validation and event ticket updates after successful payment.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    PaymentService(PaymentRepository paymentRepository, BookingRepository bookingRepository, EventRepository eventRepository)
    Constructs a PaymentService with required repositories.

  • Constructor Details

    • PaymentService

      public PaymentService(PaymentRepository paymentRepository, BookingRepository bookingRepository, EventRepository eventRepository)
      Constructs a PaymentService with required repositories.
      Parameters:
      paymentRepository - repository used for payment persistence
      bookingRepository - repository used for booking lookups
      eventRepository - repository used for event updates

  • Method Details

    • createPayment

      public Payment createPayment(Long bookingId, BigDecimal amountPaid)
      Creates a payment for a booking. Payment succeeds only if the amount paid exactly matches the booking total price. On successful payment, the event's available tickets are reduced.
      Parameters:
      bookingId - the booking ID
      amountPaid - the amount entered by the user
      Returns:
      the created payment
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if booking is not found, if payment already exists, or if payment amount is invalid

    • getPaymentById

      public Payment getPaymentById(Long id)
      Retrieves a payment by ID.
      Parameters:
      id - the payment ID
      Returns:
      the found payment
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if payment is not found

    • getPaymentsById

      public PaymentResponse getPaymentsById(Long id)
      Retrieves payment details by payment ID, including the associated customer's name.
      Parameters:
      id - the ID of the payment to retrieve
      Returns:
      the payment details along with the customer's name
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - if payment is not found

    • getAllPayments

      public List<PaymentResponse> getAllPayments()
      Retrieves all payments.
      Returns:
      list of all payments

    • getPaymentsByUserId

      public List<Payment> getPaymentsByUserId(Long userId)
      Retrieves all payments for a given user.
      Parameters:
      userId - the user ID
      Returns:
      list of the user's payments

    • deletePayment

      public void deletePayment(Long id)
      Deletes a payment by ID.
      Parameters:
      id - the payment ID
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if payment is not found

    • validatePaymentAmount

      public void validatePaymentAmount(BigDecimal totalPrice, BigDecimal amountPaid)
      Validates that the entered payment amount exactly matches the booking total price.
      Parameters:
      totalPrice - the expected booking total
      amountPaid - the amount entered by the user
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the amount does not match
